messages.body: Hi Nova Exports, please raise an SO for 18 x Black tea cartons @ 17 USD. Thanks.
Got it - subtotal 306 USD. Confirm address and payment terms?
Address: 9 Harbor Plaza, Pier 4. Payment: 50% advance.
Bhai ek minute, total kitna ban raha hai exactly?
Ji bilkul, abhi calculate karke share karta hu.
Hola, mismo pedido por favor confirmar el total.
明天上午发货，单号稍后发您。
Actually scratch that, double the quantity on the first line item.
Wait sorry - keep original qty but change unit price down by 2 USD.
Hmm, on second thought, ship to 9 Harbor Plaza instead of the address I gave.
Just to confirm - which version is final?
Final: original qty, original price, deliver to 9 Harbor Plaza.
Actually one more change - split the delivery into two equal shipments.
